item.title: She Kept Pushing The Swing While Her Son Was Gone
item.description: What happened to Ji’Aire is heartbreaking and raises serious questions about mental health support, warning signs, and how tragedies like this can unfold in plain sight. No family should ever face a loss like this, and no child should slip through the cracks. What do you think could help prevent cases like this in the future?

media:content.media:title: She Kept Pushing The Swing While Her Son Was Gone
media:content.media:description: What happened to Ji’Aire is heartbreaking and raises serious questions about mental health support, warning signs, and how tragedies like this can unfold in plain sight. No family should ever face a loss like this, and no child should slip through the cracks. What do you think could help prevent cases like this in the future?
